Title: Glaciate
Description: Conjures a solid ice block at a target with gravity and speed-based impact damage

target.Label: Target
target.Description: Where to spawn the ice block

offset.Label: Offset
offset.Description: Spawn offset: number=height, position=relative offset, entity=absolute position

duration.Label: Duration
duration.Description: How long the ice block persists

Next.Label: Next
Next.Description: The next glyph in the execution chain
